tweets:
AI doesn't just want keywords.

It wants expertise.

Write content that demonstrates:
• First-hand experience
• Specific outcomes
• Actual results
• Real patient stories

Generic content gets ignored.
Authoritative content gets cited.

The difference:
• 'We provide quality care' vs
• '98% success rate over 500+ procedures'

Start today:
Add specific metrics to every service page.

→ Need ideas? Reply 'CONTENT' 👇
full_text:
[1/3] AI doesn't just want keywords.

It wants expertise.

Write content that demonstrates:
• First-hand experience
• Specific outcomes
• Actual results
• Real patient stories

[2/3] Generic content gets ignored.
Authoritative content gets cited.

The difference:
• 'We provide quality care' vs
• '98% success rate over 500+ procedures'

[3/3] Start today:
Add specific metrics to every service page.

→ Need ideas? Reply 'CONTENT' 👇
